title: Playground Runbook Workspace
concept: An IDE-like onboarding checklist that walks plugin developers through current WordPress Playground capabilities in sequence while keeping route contracts, save consequences, and the active site visible.
focus: distinct launch and import route contracts
developer workbench for files, Blueprint, database, and logs
flows: choose a launch source with real inputs for Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, and .zip import
save a temporary Playground to browser storage or to a local directory with progress and resulting saved state
manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds with open, rename, delete, and local directory authorization states
inspect Site Manager settings, file browser, Blueprint JSON, database, logs, and additional transfer actions
browse the Blueprint catalog with search, category filters, selected detail, run, inspect JSON, and copy URL
export to GitHub, download a zip, and import a zip while showing replace-current-site consequences
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
select featured Blueprint shortcuts through the catalog
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
understand destructive reset and reload behavior
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
